description_long: This is a modern two-seater lounge sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and a low-profile design. The upholstery is a smooth, light gray fabric, complemented by five loose throw cushions—three in a dark charcoal color and two in a muted blue. The seat consists of two large, seamless cushions, while the backrest is slightly angled for comfort and topped with the decorative pillows. The armrests are straight, moderately high, and padded, matching the sofa's overall boxy aesthetic. The sofa stands on four short, square wooden legs with a dark finish, providing subtle elevation and stability. The overall look is contemporary and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater lounge sofa with straight padded armrests, five contrasting throw cushions, and short square wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two seat cushions, and all five throw pillows arranged symmetrically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backrest and the tops of the cushions, with legs visible at the corners.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the front and side, emphasizing the arrangement of cushions and the sofa's boxy shape.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose cushions: three dark gray and two blue, symmetrically placed along the backrest; two large seat cushions forming the base.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with a slight angle, unsegmented and smooth, topped with loose cushions.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, padded, medium height, matching the sofa's boxy style.
attribute_leg_style: Short, square, straight wooden legs with a dark finish, positioned at each corner.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or tufting.
